baseline.name: GME January 2021
baseline.source: SEC Staff Report on Equity and Options Market Structure Conditions in Early 2021

finra_short_volume.source: FINRA Reg SHO Daily Short Sale Volume

short_deep_dive.caveat: FINRA daily short sale volume is trade-flow data, not open short interest. Exchange-reported short interest is settlement-date based and delayed.

score.label: low similarity
score.verdict_ko: 현재는 GME 2021과의 구조적 유사성이 낮습니다. 숏 압력이 GME 2021의 극단적 기준에는 못 미침; 소셜 결집 신호가 아직 제한적; 명확한 단일 인플루언서 집중도 약함.

wsb_trending.source: ApeWisdom wallstreetbets ranking + local Reddit BoW sentiment split
wsb_trending.methodology: Rank by 24h r/wallstreetbets mention volume. Sentiment split uses a local rules-based bag-of-words classifier on recent WSB posts/comments when Reddit OAuth credentials are available; otherwise mentions are shown as neutral.

items.name: Collaborative Investment Series Trust - The SPAC and New Issue ETF
